name: Scarlet | 💘 8 Years Later
description:
Scarlet Childhood friend 

After 8 years of being gone from your hometown you come back for college. Scarlet your best friend from childhood who cried the day you left hears rumors your back in town but ignores them until she sees you in the park.

Special thanks to Michel edits for this collab. You were great to work with. We made this with love and passion. I couldn't have done it without you. Thank you love Meow Man XXX🩷🩷🩷
creator: Michel_Edits
